hero.tagline: Tobetsa 'ngoe o fumane papali ea hau e latelang.

roles.heading: App e le 'ngoe bakeng sa bohle
roles.subheading: Leha u batla ho sheba feela, ho kenela papali, kapa ho tsamaisa – Footeee e u sireletsa.

guest.title: Moeti
guest.description: Sheba lintho tse monate tsa bolo ka boiketlo ba hau.
guest.longDescription: Sheba lipapali tsohle tse tlang, lintlha tsa libaka, le baraleli ba teng – tsohle ntle le akhaonto. E loketse batho ba ratang bolo.

player.title: Sebapali
player.description: Papali ea hau e latelang e metsotso e se mekae feela!
player.longDescription: Kenela lipapali ka tobetso e le 'ngoe, bona hore na ke mang ea bapallang, 'me o fumane litsebiso ha sebaka se buleha kapa papali e le haufi le ho qala.

manager.title: Motsamaisi
manager.description: Tlohela Footeee e hlokomele lefatše la hau la bolo!
manager.longDescription: Taolo e felletseng ea lipapali, lihlopha, le baraleli. Theha lipapali, khetha lihlopha, latela boteng, 'me o tsamaise setjhaba sa hau sa bolo.

footer.availableOn: E fumaneha ho iOS le Android

privacy.title: Leano la Lekunutu
privacy.intro: Footeee ("rona", "ea rona") e sebelisa app ea Footeee ea mohala ("App") le webosaete ena. Leano lena la lekunutu le hlalosa kamoo re bokellang, re sebelisang, re fang, le ho sireletsa tlhahisoleseling ea hau ha u sebelisa App le litšebeletso tse amanang le eona.
privacy.section1Intro: Re ka bokella mefuta e latelang ea tlhahisoleseling:
privacy.section1Item1: Tlhahisoleseling ea akhaonto (mohlala: lebitso, aterese ea imeile, lintlha tsa ho kena ka tsela e sireletsehileng).
privacy.section1Item2: Tlhahisoleseling ea tšebeliso ea app (mohlala: lipapali tseo u li thehang/kenelang, lihlopha, libaka, le likamano).
privacy.section1Item3: Tlhahisoleseling ea sesebelisoa/theknoloji (mohlala: mofuta oa sesebelisoa, mofuta oa OS, mofuta oa app, liteko).
privacy.section2Title: 2. Kamoo re Sebelisang Tlhahisoleseling ea Hau
privacy.section2Item1: Ho theha le ho tsamaisa akhaonto ea hau.
privacy.section2Item2: Ho fana ka litšebeletso tsa mantlha joalo ka ho theha lipapali, ho kenela, le ho tsamaisa lihlopha.
privacy.section2Item3: Ho fana ka tšehetso le ho araba likopo.
privacy.section2Item4: Ho ntlafatsa ts'epahalo, tšebetso, le boiphihlelo ba mosebelisi.
privacy.section2Item5: Ho sireletsa ts'ireletso le botšepehi ba litšebeletso tsa rona.
privacy.section2NoSell: Ha re rekise tlhahisoleseling ea hau ea botho.
privacy.section3Text: Re ka arolelana tlhahisoleseling feela ha ho hlokahala hore tšebeletso e sebetse, ho latela melao, kapa ho sireletsa litokelo le ts'ireletso. Mohlala, re ka sebelisa bafani ba meralo (ho hosta, imeile, joalo-joalo) ba sebelisang data bakeng sa rona ka ts'ireletso e nepahetseng.
privacy.section4Text: Re sebelisa mekhoa e utloahalang ea theknoloji le mokhatlo ho sireletsa tlhahisoleseling ea hau (mohlala: HTTPS, taolo ea phihlello). Ha ho na mokhoa oa ho romela kapa ho boloka o sireletsehileng ka 100%, kahoo re ke ke ra tiisa ts'ireletso e felletseng.
privacy.section5Text: Re boloka tlhahisoleseling ea botho nako e telele kamoo ho hlokahalang ho fana ka tšebeletso le bakeng sa merero e molaong ea khoebo (mohlala: ho latela melao, ts'ireletso, ho rarolla liphapang), ntle le haeba molao o hloka nako e telele.
privacy.section6Text: Ho latela moo u leng teng (ho kenyelletsa UK/EU), u ka ba le litokelo tsa ho fumana, ho lokisa, ho hlakola, kapa ho thibela ts'ebetso ea data ea hau ea botho, le ho kopa hore e fetisoe. Ho sebelisa litokelo tsena, ikopanye le rona.
privacy.section7Text: Footeee ha ea etselitsoe bana ba ka tlase ho lilemo tse 13. Ha re bokelle ka boomo tlhahisoleseling ea botho ea bana ba ka tlase ho lilemo tse 13.
privacy.section8Text: Re ka nna ra fetola leano lena ka linako. Liphetoho li tla hlahisoa leqepheng lena ka letsatsi le letjha la "E fetotsoeng la ho qetela".

deleteData.title: Hlakola Data ea Ka
deleteData.description: O na le tokelo ea ho kopa ho hlakoloa ha akhaonto ea hau le tlhahisoleseling ea botho e amanang le eona. Re sebetsa likopo matsatsing a 30.
deleteData.successMessage: Kopo ea hau e lokisitsoe. Romela imeile e bulehileng ka hare ho app ea hau ea imeile. Re tla e sebetsa matsatsing a 30.
deleteData.emailLabel: Imeile e hokahantsoeng le akhaonto ea hau
deleteData.scopeLabel: U batla hore eng e hlakoloe?
deleteData.scopeFull: Tsohle — hlakola akhaonto ea ka le data eohle
deleteData.scopeData: Data feela — boloka akhaonto empa hlakola data ea mesebetsi
deleteData.scopeProfile: Profaele feela — hlakola tlhahisoleseling ea profaele
deleteData.confirmLabel: Ke utloisisa hore ketso ena e ke ke ea khutlisoa.
deleteData.emailRequired: Ka kopo kenya imeile e hokahantsoeng le akhaonto ea hau.
deleteData.scopeFullLabel: Ho hlakola akhaonto eohle + data eohle
deleteData.scopeDataLabel: Ho hlakola data ea mesebetsi feela
deleteData.scopeProfileLabel: Ho hlakola data ea profaele feela

manager.title: Tsamaisa
manager.subtitle: Sebaka sa hau sa mosebetsi sa motsamaisi
